title: Mandatory Returns and Unroutable Publication · Go Build Room
summary: A Go pairing room incrementally implements a correlated Go return and route-evidence ledger, first with deterministic values and then with a changed failure, while keeping prior messaging invariants active. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of a correlated Go return and route-evidence ledger while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.
Distinguish broker confirms from consumer processing and combine mandatory returns or alternate routing with confirm results; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Build topology fixtures that assert expected destination sets, forbidden routes, unroutable cases, permissions, and changed bindings; in Go, retain ownership, stop-path, and changed-case evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Mandatory Return Sequence
steps.instruction:
workshop case — A workshop Go messaging team handles case 4997 during outbox relay recovery after a database commit. Build deterministic Go evidence to keep return, alternate custody, confirmation, and unknown route evidence separate; name the owner and stop path for every goroutine and notification channel; then remove the parking binding and expose the remediation gap. Browser code uses pure values and state transitions only. amqp091-go, AMQP sockets, RabbitMQ, TLS, partitions, restarts, Docker, databases, race and leak checks, load, upgrades, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent.

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Mandatory Return Sequence.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for register and drain return notifications before mandatory publication and correlate content, exchange, routing key, properties, and publisher intent. For RabbitMQ and Go Commit to the mission model · Workshop Mandatory Return Sequence, keep Mandatory Return Sequence connected to executable Go messaging decision evidence.

steps.instruction:
